{{# Mister Chameleon — Adaptive Slot (server-side page-builder block) ---------------------------------------------------------------- Renders one context_slot block SERVER-SIDE via the {{ mc:slot }} tag. The block's CMS-authored fields are handed to the tag as `fallback_*` params, so the personalised value (when the platform returns one) is baked into the initial HTML, and the CMS content renders otherwise — no client swap, no flash, SEO-personalised. Requires the misterchameleon/adaptive-slots addon (this package) installed and a configured MC_SITE_KEY. #}} {{ mc:slot :type="slot_type" :fallback_tag="tag" :fallback_title="heading" :fallback_subtitle="body" :fallback_text="body" :fallback_message="message" :fallback_severity="severity" :fallback_cta_label="cta_label" :fallback_cta_href="cta_url" }}
{{ if slot_type == 'notification' }} {{ if message }}
{{ message }} {{ if cta_label }}{{ cta_label }}{{ /if }}
{{ /if }} {{ else }} {{ if slot_type == 'hero' and tag }}

{{ tag }}

{{ /if }} {{ if title }}

{{ title }}

{{ /if }} {{ if slot_type == 'cta' or slot_type == 'conversion' }} {{ if text }}

{{ text | nl2br }}

{{ /if }} {{ else }} {{ if subtitle }}

{{ subtitle | nl2br }}

{{ /if }} {{ /if }} {{ if media }}{{ media }}{{ /media }}{{ /if }} {{ if cta_label and (slot_type == 'hero' or slot_type == 'cta' or slot_type == 'conversion') }} {{ cta_label }} {{ /if }} {{ /if }}
{{ /mc:slot }}
